prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 发票处理系统。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/69-ai-invoice-processing-system.html

[环境] NocoBase env `appslib`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e appslib -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai69_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `appslib` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。
prompt.launchInstruction: First read the nocobase-prototype-repro skill (SKILL.md + references/). Then read ~/prj/vscodes/app-library-bench/tooling/bench/prompts/round-61-90/p69.prompt.txt as the user requirement and reproduce it END-TO-END in the NocoBase env 'appslib' via the nb CLI (ALWAYS pass -e appslib): SPEC -> data modeling in ONE pass -> all-English seed (every enum) -> list pages (Filter+Add+Table+View drawer+sub-tables) -> refine signature regions -> screenshot self-check >=80%. Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.

outcome.finalText:
Everything is built, verified, and memory saved. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — InvoiceIQ (AI Invoice Processing System) reproduced on `appslib`

The OSS prototype URL (`…/templates/69-…html`) was **404 / NoSuchKey**; I used the local copy `app-library-bench/web/69-…html`. It had **no embedded `nb-spec` JSON**, so the spec was derived by reading the rendered prototype + its seed `INV[]`/`FEED[]` arrays.

## ① Collections (prefix `ai69_`, env appslib)
| Collection | Purpose | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ai69_vendors` | Vendor master | name, address, country, **category**(7), **status**(3), **payment_terms**(4), vat_id, bank_verified | ← invoices |
| `ai69_invoices` | Invoice (core) | invoice_no, **file_type**(3), issue/due_date, po_number, **currency**(3), total_amount, **status**(5), confidence, **confidence_band**(3), ai_model, po_flagged, **ai_verdict**(4), ai_summary, routed_to, **department**(4), gl_code, **cost_center**(3) | m2o **vendor**; o2m line_items/checks/activities |
| `ai69_line_items` | Invoice line items | description, quantity, unit_price, amount | m2o invoice |
| `ai69_checks` | AI assessment findings | finding, **severity**(3), confidence | m2o invoice |
| `ai69_activity` | AI activity feed | **event_type**(6), message, confidence, occurred_at | m2o invoice |

**Seed**: 14 vendors, **15 invoices** (12 from prototype verbatim + PNG/`processing` + `paid` + GBP/`marketing` extras), 44 line items, 41 AI checks, 7 activity events. **Every enum branch ≥1 row, all-English.**

## ② Signature page
**Dashboard ("Accounts Payable") — `pageSchemaUid = e8kzn7xaz0m`** (pageUid `lgkxbk8qasw`), menu group **InvoiceIQ**.
Region→block map (native-container + JS-content):
- **KPI strip** (4 cards, live aggregates + sparklines) → JSBlock
- **Upload zone** ("Drop invoices to extract" + Extract & Analyze) → JSBlock
- **Invoice Inbox** → native **List** + whole-record **JSField** card (file icon+ext, vendor, id·date, status pill, PO-m

transcript.cmd: {"skill": "nocobase-prototype-repro"}

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

| Task shape | Read first | Then, as needed |
|---|---|---|
| Prototype handed over → reproduce end-to-end | [spec-template.md](references/spec-template.md) (Phase 1 SPEC) | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md), [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) |
| Existing page is monotone / ugly / off | [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |
| "Which block for this region?" | the **Region → native block** table below | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Need a **JS body** for a widget (KPI card, donut, leaderboard, due-soon alert, progress bar, trend, facet filter, card grid, …) | [template-library/_index.md](references/template-library/_index.md) — 57 copy-pastable widget bodies, each with its `$p` input contract | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Build/edit JS, flow-surfaces, popup, chart **mechanics** + runnable CLI | `nocobase-ui-builder` (its `js.md` / `popup.md` / `chart.md` / `runjs-*` / `page-archetypes.md`) | — |
| Collections / fields / relations | `nocobase-data-modeling` | — |
| Scope discipline, seed standards, naming, final report | `nocobase-app-discipline` | — |
| No prototype given, must author one | [prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md) | — |
| Hand the build to another agent fro

transcript.text:
Everything is built, verified, and memory saved. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — InvoiceIQ (AI Invoice Processing System) reproduced on `appslib`

The OSS prototype URL (`…/templates/69-…html`) was **404 / NoSuchKey**; I used the local copy `app-library-bench/web/69-…html`. It had **no embedded `nb-spec` JSON**, so the spec was derived by reading the rendered prototype + its seed `INV[]`/`FEED[]` arrays.

## ① Collections (prefix `ai69_`, env appslib)
| Collection | Purpose | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ai69_vendors` | Vendor master | name, address, country, **category**(7), **status**(3), **payment_terms**(4), vat_id, bank_verified | ← invoices |
| `ai69_invoices` | Invoice (core) | invoice_no, **file_type**(3), issue/due_date, po_number, **currency**(3), total_amount, **status**(5), confidence, **confidence_band**(3), ai_model, po_flagged, **ai_verdict**(4), ai_summary, routed_to, **department**(4), gl_code, **cost_center**(3) | m2o **vendor**; o2m line_items/checks/activities |
| `ai69_line_items` | Invoice line items | description, quantity, unit_price, amount | m2o invoice |
| `ai69_checks` | AI assessment findings | finding, **severity**(3), confidence | m2o invoice |
| `ai69_activity` | AI activity feed | **event_type**(6), message, confidence, occurred_at | m2o invoice |

**Seed**: 14 vendors, **15 invoices** (12 from prototype verbatim + PNG/`processing` + `paid` + GBP/`marketing` extras), 44 line items, 41 AI checks, 7 activity events. **Every enum branch ≥1 row, all-English.**

## ② Signature page
**Dashboard ("Accounts Payable") — `pageSchemaUid = e8kzn7xaz0m`** (pageUid `lgkxbk8qasw`), menu group **InvoiceIQ**.
Region→block map (native-container + JS-content):
- **KPI strip** (4 cards, live aggregates + sparklines) → JSBlock
- **Upload zone** ("Drop invoices to extract" + Extract & Analyze) → JSBlock
- **Invoice Inbox** → native **List** + whole-record **JSField** card (file icon+ext, vendor, id·date, status pill, PO-match chip, SVG confidence ring, amount/due, chevron); **quick-filter pills** (All/Needs review/Approved/Exceptions w/ live counts) → toolbar **JSItemAction** cross-filtering the list resource; row click → native **drawer** (Details + line_items sub-table + checks sub-table, via `associationField`)
- **AI Confidence Mix donut** (conic-gradient + High/Med/Low legend + avg) → JSBlock
- **AI Activity feed** → native **List** + **JSField** feed row (colored event icon + message + AI tag + relative time + conf%)

Plus **5 master list pages** (Filter+Add+Table+View-drawer): Invoices `e5q8ijw9l41` (with line-items & checks sub-tables), Vendors `qtw1dgs3jj6`, Line items `uynagnhyllo`, AI checks `f2xf28havmi`, AI activity `267zpe44xoz`.

Verified via fresh-browser Playwright (token in `localStorage`): **zero console/page errors**, drawer opens with sub-tables, the Exceptions pill issues `filter={"$and":[{"status":{"$eq":"exception"}}]}` and narrows the list to 2 rows.

## ③ Self-Score: **8.5/10**

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Structure/blocks/colors match**: KPI strip, two-column body (left upzone+inbox, right donut+feed), card anatomy, status/PO/confidence color semantics, drawer all reproduced. Inbox is a List-of-cards (not a bare table); donut is a real ring; feed has colored event icons.
- **Expected deltas (live data, not mock)**: KPIs read 15 processed / 27% auto / 8 review / $83.0K and donut avg 84% vs the prototype's hardcoded 241 / 73% / 7 / $318.4K / 94.2% — correct behavior, computed from seed.
- **Minor cosmetic deltas**: quick-filter pills live in the block's top-right toolbar (next to Filter/Refresh/Add new) rather than the card header; confidence number sits inside the ring with a "conf." caption vs "71% confidence" beside it. App chrome is NocoBase's own left nav rather than the prototype's branded sidebar (inherent).

## ⑤ Pitfalls hit
1. **Dead OSS URL + no nb-spec** → fell back to the local HTML and hand-authored the spec.
2. **`fields apply` reverse re
